info.description: Eyebrow + H2 + image + a vertical list of accent-bar points. Client addition: the groundwater service's "Borehole programs with defensible field data" block. Optional; only groundwater-monitoring uses it.

eyebrow.description: Small uppercase teal kicker, e.g. GROUNDWATER MONITORING.

media.description: Optional. When empty the section shows a built-in borehole illustration; upload here to replace it.
